title: Zynax AgentDef Manifest
description: JSON Schema for a Zynax AgentDef manifest (kind: AgentDef, apiVersion: zynax.io/v1alpha1). Declares the capabilities a gRPC agent provides, the container image to run, and the runtime configuration. Submitted to AgentRegistryService via 'zynax apply' or the CLI. The registry derives its AgentDef record from this manifest.

kind.description: Must be 'AgentDef'. Distinguishes agent declarations from Workflow and other Zynax resource kinds.

apiVersion.description: Schema version. The registry rejects manifests with an unrecognised apiVersion.

metadata.description: Identifying information for the AgentDef resource.

name.description: Unique agent name within the namespace. Used as agent_id in the registry.

namespace.description: Logical namespace for multi-tenant isolation. Defaults to 'default' when omitted.

labels.description: Key-value labels for filtering via ListAgents label selectors. Follows Kubernetes label syntax: alphanumeric, '-', '_', '.'; max 63 chars per key and value.

spec.description: The agent's capability declarations and runtime configuration.

capabilities.description: Ordered list of capabilities this agent implements. The task broker routes work to this agent when a workflow action names one of these capabilities.

capability.description: A single named capability provided by this agent. Maps to CapabilityDef in AgentRegistryService.

name.description: Unique routing key for this capability within the agent. Matched by the task broker when dispatching ActionIR.capability. Format: lowercase letters, digits, and underscores; 1–64 characters (matches ExecuteCapabilityRequest.capability_name).

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this capability does. Shown in the agent registry UI and generated documentation.

input_schema.description: JSON Schema (draft-07 subset) describing the valid input_payload structure. The task broker validates dispatch payloads against this schema at runtime.

output_schema.description: JSON Schema (draft-07 subset) describing the result payload emitted in COMPLETED TaskEvent.payload.

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum wall-clock seconds this capability may run before the task broker marks the task FAILED. Must be a positive integer.

max_retries.description: Maximum times the task broker will re-queue a failed task before marking it permanently FAILED. Zero means no retries.

runtime.description: Container runtime configuration for deploying this agent. Used by the Zynax control plane to schedule and run the gRPC server.

image.description: Fully qualified container image reference including tag or digest. Example: 'ghcr.io/zynax-io/code-review-agent:v1.2.3'.

env.description: Environment variables injected into the container at runtime. Sensitive values should reference Kubernetes Secrets via the CLI, not be inlined here.

replicas.description: Number of agent instances to run. Defaults to 1. The task broker distributes load across all healthy replicas.

resources.description: CPU and memory resource requests and limits for the agent container. Follows Kubernetes resource quantity syntax.

resourceQuantities.description: CPU and memory resource quantities. CPU in millicores (e.g. '100m', '0.5') or cores ('1'). Memory in bytes with SI/binary suffixes (e.g. '128Mi', '1Gi', '512M').

cpu.description: CPU quantity. Examples: '100m' (100 millicores), '0.5' (half a core), '2' (two cores).

jsonSchemaObject.description: A JSON Schema object (draft-07 subset). Must declare 'type: object' at the top level.

jsonSchemaField.description: A single field definition within a JSON Schema properties map.
